title: TNAU Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Assistant / Technical Assistant Posts
short_info: Tamil Nadu Agricultural University (TNAU) Project Assistant / Technical Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Tamil Nadu Agricultural University. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the TNAU Project Assistant / Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree in Arts and Science Domain, UG / PG Professional Course Degree or Equivalent in Agriculture / Engineering / Technology / Medical / Veterinary etc., Diploma in Agriculture / Horticulture or Any other Degree
qualification.details: Project Assistant: i) PG Degree in Arts and Science Domain. ii) UG / PG Professional Course Degree or Equivalent in Agriculture / Engineering / Technology / Medical / Veterinary etc. Technical Assistant: Diploma in Agriculture / Horticulture or Any other Degree

salary_details.details: Project Assistant: Rs. 25,000/- p.m. Technical Assistant: Rs. 16,000/- p.m.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for TNAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 01 June 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Assistant / Technical Assistant posts at TNAU?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Project Assistant and Technical Assistant positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Project Assistant post, candidates need a PG Degree in Arts and Science Domain or a UG/PG Professional Course Degree or equivalent in Agriculture/Engineering/Technology/Medical/Veterinary etc.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Technical Assistant position is Rs. 16,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for TNAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category of candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for TNAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-In. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Madurai, Tamil Nadu. Specific venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details and any relaxation applicable.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for TNAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.
